mapper.insert: insert into vote01(vote_name, vote_gender, vote_poli, vote_insti, vote_insti_sort, vote_inter_sort, vote_major) values(#{voteName}, #{voteGender}, #{votePoli}, #{voteInsti}, #{voteInstiSort}, #{voteInterSort}, #{voteMajor})
mapper.update: update vote01 set vote_poll=vote_poll+1 where vote_id = #{id}
